project_info.vibe: Dark, cinematic, moody, automotive magazine spread crossed with a personal portfolio

surfaces.texture: Filmic grain overlay required on background. (e.g. SVG noise or CSS background-image with noise pattern, opacity-20)

motion.transitions: framer-motion for page reveals, stagger children in grids, slow scale-up on image hover (duration: 0.8s, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1])

hero.description: Cinematic full-bleed or massively padded container. Use the 'Silver convertible' image as background with a heavy vignette/gradient overlay (bg-black/60 to transparent). Large Playfair Display typography offset to the bottom left. An 'overline' introducing the location 'Hamilton, ON'.

portfolio_grid.description: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric. Mix of col-span-12 (hero shots), col-span-4 (portraits), and col-span-8 (wide automotive shots). Large gaps (gap-8). Hover states must subtly scale the image and reveal an accent-colored border or title.

about.description: Editorial split layout. Left side: moody portrait of the photographer or text. Right side: heavily indented text. Break the symmetrical 50/50 split. Use 40/60. Large quotes in Playfair Display.

images.description: Silver convertible sports car parked at night - cinematic hero background
Moody portrait of woman in lush dark ferns
Dark architecture, tall building with windows
Motorcycle parked on dark street at night

images.url: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
images.description: Inline SVG noise texture for filmic grain

shadcn_overrides.button: Minimal, sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary button uses the accent color (#FF3B30). Hover states should be a bright saturated lift, not a dull grey.
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Use for portfolio filtering. Avoid default boxed look. Make them text-only with a bottom 1px active indicator in the accent color.
shadcn_overrides.input: Dark background (#121214), border-white/10. Focus state must glow with the accent color (ring-accent/50). Sharp corners.

rules: All interactive elements (buttons, filters, forms) MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 5-section one-page portfolio or multi-page layout: Hero, Portfolio/Gallery, About, Services, Contact.
Include a basic admin view mockup (route /admin) for uploading photos with category tags.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (grids, hero) to maintain asymmetrical artistic control.
Use Shadcn UI ONLY for the Contact Form inputs/buttons and the Admin panel.
Strictly adhere to the dark theme, using the noise texture overlaid on the body to create a cinematic film grain effect.
Do NOT use pure #000000; use the specified #0A0A0C background.
